message:
fix(ui): use results-pane width for pane strip scroll calculations

visible_pane_capacity() was using last_content_area (full content
width including detail pane) instead of last_results_inner (results
pane only). This caused adjust_pane_scroll_offset() to think more
panes were visible than actually fit, preventing the pane strip from
scrolling to keep the active pane in view.

Closes #107

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
